from flask import request, Response, Flask

app = Flask(__name__)


@app.route('set_location_header')

codeql_results.message: Untrusted URL redirection depends on a [user-provided value](1).

findings.description: CodeQL detected potential open redirect vulnerability in URL validation logic at line 19. The validation allows relative paths but may be bypassed through crafted inputs.
findings.remediation_code: if not parsed.scheme and not parsed.netloc and not next_url.startswith('//') and next_url.startswith('/'):
findings.remediation_description: Add explicit check for absolute path starting with '/' to prevent bypasses

report.recommendation: Validate URL redirection logic with stricter path validation and consider implementing a whitelist of allowed redirect paths

patch_feedback.priority: Fix SUSPECTED issues with codeql_confirmed=true first
